name: Location Name
description: A brief atmospheric description of the location that captures its essence and sets the tone for encounters here.
impulses: Primary thematic drives or motivations that guide this location's behavior and narrative
potentialAdversaries: Types of creatures or antagonists that might be encountered here

features.name: Feature Name
features.description: Detailed mechanical description of how this feature works. Include: trigger conditions, action rolls required, success/failure outcomes, Hope/Fear spending costs, damage values, conditions applied, and any ongoing effects or counters.
features.questions: What narrative questions does this feature raise? What might players discover or learn here?

features.name: Another Feature
features.description: Mechanics for an active feature that requires player action. Format: 'When PCs [trigger], they make a [Stat] action roll. On a success: [outcome]. On a success with Hope: [enhanced outcome]. On a failure: [consequence]. On a failure with Fear: [severe consequence].'
features.questions: How does this feature connect to the location's history or larger world? What secrets might it reveal?

features.name: Reactive Feature
features.description: Spend X Fear to [trigger condition]. Target makes a [Stat] Reaction Roll. On a failure: [mechanical effect and narrative consequence]. On a failure with Fear: [enhanced negative effect].
features.questions: Why does this feature exist? What ancient purpose did it serve? How has time changed it?

features.name: Counter System
features.description: Start a [Counter Name] at [starting value]. [Describe conditions that modify the counter]. At [threshold 1]: [first stage effects]. At [threshold 2]: [escalated effects]. At 0: [climactic final effect or permanent change].
features.questions: What happens if the counter reaches its extremes? Can players reverse or manipulate this system?

featureQuestions: What larger mysteries or campaign questions does this location connect to?
How might this location change or evolve over multiple visits?
What factions or NPCs have interests in this place?
What opportunities for player agency or meaningful choices exist here?
